script_text: Like the word 'cat.' Change the C to B and you get 'bat!'
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: You can change the beginning sound. 'Mat' becomes 'sat' when M changes to S.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Change the ending sound too. 'Cat' becomes 'can' when T changes to N.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.

script_text: Start with 'hop.' Change the H to M. What new word do you get? Mop!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Pause briefly before saying 'Mop'.

script_text: Start with 'big.' Change the B to D. What new word do you get? Dig!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Pause briefly before saying 'Dig'.

script_text: Try it. Start with 'top.' Change the T to a P and you get 'pop!'
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing. Do not stretch or exaggerate any sounds.
